spec_match.rationale: The page accurately explains the parent attribute plus child response header double opt-in.

interactive.rationale: A live probe checks the iframe IDL surface and the server-served Supports-Responsive-Sizing header, with a rerun control.

summary: The static walkthrough now includes a live capability and header probe, answering the open interactivity critique.
